name: Coupang, Inc.
summary: Coupang, Inc. is a technology and Fortune 150 company listed on the NYSE that provides retail, restaurant delivery, video streaming, and fintech services under brands including Coupang, Eats, Play, Rocket Now, and Farfetch. Operating in over 190 countries and territories, Coupang offers fast delivery, broad product selection, fresh groceries, luxury goods, digital entertainment, and payments, serving millions of customers primarily in Korea and internationally.
